domain: Komi-Permyak warding stick (Finno-Ugric Komi people; carved apotropaic stick with Old Permic glyphs + eye motifs placed at house threshold; periodically re-carved as new evils discovered)
specific_mechanism: Adversarial-coevolution training of an INPUT-BOUNDARY defensive prefix-token whose parameters are continuously updated against an attacker LLM evolving new jailbreak categories.
llm_application: KOMI-WARD: adversarial-coevolution boundary defensive-token training. A defensive prefix-token (or short token-prefix) is appended at the user-input boundary (before user content enters attention). Its embedding parameters are trained in a co-evolution loop: attacker LLM generates jailbreak prompts -> defender measures success rate -> updates prefix-token to decrease attack success. As attacker evolves, defender re-carves new 'glyphs' (defensive-token parameter updates). Threshold-positioned at input. Differs from canary-token (R406 — privacy verification not adversarial), adversarial training (full-model not prefix-only), LLM Sentinel (separate agent not prefix-token), ReFAT (refusal-feature ablation in intermediate layers) by combining (a) PREFIX-TOKEN-ONLY parameter coevolution, (b) input-boundary positioning, (c) attacker-driven update schedule.
novelty_claim: Attack-Defense Co-Evolution 2511.19218 covers attacker-defender co-evol. ReFAT covers dynamic refusal-feature. LLM Sentinel covers boundary-agent. KOMI-WARD recombines prefix-token + coevolution + input-boundary. Recombination.
